records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAACK!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAACK!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAACK!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why am I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why am I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why am I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was...

records.m_Talk_ENG: After I got caught up in Miss Aditya's attack...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After I got caught up in Miss Aditya's attack...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After I got caught up in Miss Aditya's attack...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was... swallowed by the C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was... swallowed by the C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was... swallowed by the C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww... Ouch... My wounds are still there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww... Ouch... My wounds are still there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww... Ouch... My wounds are still there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how am I still alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how am I still alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how am I still alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The compass keeps spinning like it doesn't know which way to point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The compass keeps spinning like it doesn't know which way to point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The compass keeps spinning like it doesn't know which way to point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This means that Miss Aditya is not around here, at least...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This means that Miss Aditya is not around here, at least...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This means that Miss Aditya is not around here, at least...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, where in the world am I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, where in the world am I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, where in the world am I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Now I understand. This is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Now I understand. This is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Now I understand. This is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hell!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hell!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hell!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... Guess hell isn't that much different from the Counterside...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... Guess hell isn't that much different from the Counterside...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... Guess hell isn't that much different from the Counterside...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder if Miss Aditya made it out okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder if Miss Aditya made it out okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder if Miss Aditya made it out okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I shouldn't have woken her up in the capsule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I shouldn't have woken her up in the capsule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I shouldn't have woken her up in the capsule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but if I didn't, I would've been sold off to somewhere as a slave.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but if I didn't, I would've been sold off to somewhere as a slave.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but if I didn't, I would've been sold off to somewhere as a slave.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, I'm dead now. So, guess it ended the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, I'm dead now. So, guess it ended the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, I'm dead now. So, guess it ended the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right... Whatever the case, I was fated to die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right... Whatever the case, I was fated to die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right... Whatever the case, I was fated to die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do I hear footsteps?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do I hear footsteps?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do I hear footsteps?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think they came from around here... Oh, is it that way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think they came from around here... Oh, is it that way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think they came from around here... Oh, is it that way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are they...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are they...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are they...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They look like they're from the Administration... But something feels different about them...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They look like they're from the Administration... But something feels different about them...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They look like they're from the Administration... But something feels different about them...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you all hear the operation briefing? We're going to quickly pass through starting from the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you all hear the operation briefing? We're going to quickly pass through starting from the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you all hear the operation briefing? We're going to quickly pass through starting from the outskirts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you all hear the operation briefing? We're going to quickly pass through starting from the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you all hear the operation briefing? We're going to quickly pass through starting from the outskirts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you all hear the operation briefing? We're going to quickly pass through starting from the outskirts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Di</color>d you</color> all hear the operation <color=#ff3636>bri</color>efing? We're going to <color=#ff3636>quick</color>ly pass through starting from the <color=#ff3636>out</color>skirts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Di</color>d you</color> all hear the operation <color=#ff3636>bri</color>efing? We're going to <color=#ff3636>quick</color>ly pass through starting from the <color=#ff3636>out</color>skirts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those people. Why are they repeating the same movements over and over again...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those people. Why are they repeating the same movements over and over again...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those people. Why are they repeating the same movements over and over again...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmph?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmph?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmph?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shh! Stay still.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shh! Stay still.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shh! Stay still.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmff! Mmphh! MMMMPH!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmff! Mmphh! MMMMPH!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmff! Mmphh! MMMMPH!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't talk to <color=#ffd34c>them</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't talk to <color=#ffd34c>them</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't talk to <color=#ffd34c>them</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The second they notice you, they will start attacking you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The second they notice you, they will start attacking you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The second they notice you, they will start attacking you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to take my hand off your mouth, so could you stay calm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to take my hand off your mouth, so could you stay calm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to take my hand off your mouth, so could you stay calm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... the Shadow who attacked us at the desert?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... the Shadow who attacked us at the desert?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... the Shadow who attacked us at the desert?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? A Shadow?! This is the first time I'm seeing you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? A Shadow?! This is the first time I'm seeing you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? A Shadow?! This is the first time I'm seeing you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't play dumb! You almost kill me, you know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't play dumb! You almost kill me, you know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't play dumb! You almost kill me, you know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way you can have a peaceful talk with a Shadow in the first place...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way you can have a peaceful talk with a Shadow in the first place...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way you can have a peaceful talk with a Shadow in the first place...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't know that. Even wild animals approach quietly when hunting prey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't know that. Even wild animals approach quietly when hunting prey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't know that. Even wild animals approach quietly when hunting prey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You might be a Shadow who's pretending to be human so you can eat me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You might be a Shadow who's pretending to be human so you can eat me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You might be a Shadow who's pretending to be human so you can eat me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone who called this place hell, you're awfully careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone who called this place hell, you're awfully careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone who called this place hell, you're awfully careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-were you eavesdropping on me this whole time?! Wait, you're saying that this isn't hell?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-were you eavesdropping on me this whole time?! Wait, you're saying that this isn't hell?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-were you eavesdropping on me this whole time?! Wait, you're saying that this isn't hell?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that sound...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that sound...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that sound...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. No, this isn't hell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. No, this isn't hell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. No, this isn't hell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And we should make sure not to be seen by them first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And we should make sure not to be seen by them first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And we should make sure not to be seen by them first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's your choice to trust me, but I recommend that you follow me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's your choice to trust me, but I recommend that you follow me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's your choice to trust me, but I recommend that you follow me.
